features.name: ROM memory with non-power-of-2 word count and address boundary check
features.description: Code should include a ROM/memory with address width larger than the actual number of words, combined with an out-of-bounds check on the address or data output before using the value

features.name: asynchronous ROM with conditional output based on address range
features.description: Code should include an asynchronous read-only memory where the output is conditionally selected based on whether the address exceeds a threshold
